column1: # Note: Basic adverbs (なかなか, いつも, etc.) are in L1 adverbs.h
# Note: な形容詞 + に patterns (非常に, 本当に, etc.) handled by L1 na_adjectives.h
# - Need POS distinction (would be NOUN without dict)
# よく is the adverbial form of よい/いい (irregular conjugation)
# These are grammatically correct splits but dict entries help with POS
# --- POS distinction adverbs (would be NOUN/other without dict) ---
